title: Disco and Thisco's Deep-Sea Submarine Adventure
summary: Disco and Thisco embark on a grand undersea voyage in a custom-built plastic bottle submarine. Accompanied by helpful moles, the duo packs their vessel with essentials like snacks, oxygen tanks, controllers, and even dental floss. Their journey takes them twenty miles beneath the waves, navigating past deep-sea trenches and a massive bridge with a stop at a local underwater coffee shop. Upon reaching the vibrant coral reefs, they marvel at a world of colorful fish, jellyfish, and octopuses. Their mission continues toward the very bottom of the ocean, where the mysterious Kingdom of the Sea Mice awaits their arrival.

highlightQuote.text: And some Band-Aids and dental flosses, did you pack those?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'm going to turn off the lamp. All right, now it's time for a short Stars and Story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What story, Stars and Story?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah. Well, once upon a time...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's do a Disco and Thisco story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Disco and Thisco decided to build their own submarine. What did they build it out of?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Why are you building a submarine, guys?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we want to explore the deep dark ocean.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: With find sharks or clams?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, they have sharks and clams down there. Uh, no, we heard there was a kingdom of the sea mice down there, we wanted to visit.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Or crabs, or you could even visit some lobsters, or even maybe some scuba divers, or tropical fish, even the Caribbean amphibians' house!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, there's so many places to go in the ocean. We need to build our submarine first if we're going to go in there. Can you help us?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't think so, because I'm going to bed soon, so I don't think I can do that, but I can do it at next morning because my nap helped me because it's a really big job building a submarine, so Dad has to help me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay, you're right. Maybe we should all just go to bed and work on our submarine in the morning. And so everyone went to bed. (Snoring sounds)

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually Moles, you can work on it and then I'll chime in in the morning.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay, that sounds good. And so the moles found a big plastic bottle, and they cut some holes in it for windows and a hole for a door, and then they sealed it up with the cap. And then they added a little propeller motor to the back and a periscope for the top. And Disco says, is there anything else we're missing? And Thisco says, well, we'll need some seats inside maybe. And Disco said, oh yeah, and snacks, we'd better bring some snacks. And they decided they were all ready to go to the ocean.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You know we have to bring oxygen tanks.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah, said Disco, we forgot about that. What else do we need?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Gadgets, controllers, and some things, and some other things like that.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh okay, yeah, you need a lot of things to go on a submarine adventure. And so, their submarine was all ready, and they brought it to the ocean...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And some Band-Aids and dental flosses, did you pack those?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No, we forgot! And so they went to the store and they got those things too. And they said, okay, I think we're ready. Do you think we're ready?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So Disco and Thisco got in their submarine and they dove underwater, through the bright sparkling blue waves...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Do you want to try the coral reefs this time?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, let's go to the coral reefs.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's just down at 20 miles, and then we have to go in the trenches, and then under deep sea bridge, and then we'll be at the coral reefs, and we'll park there, and then we'll stop at the coffee shop on the way to the coral reefs, and then we're at the coral reefs and we can explore.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they had an amazing adventure going 20 miles in and into the trenches and under the bridge and they stopped at the coffee shop and got a nice little treat. And then they parked at the coral reef. What did they see there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're going to explore.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, they saw beautiful coral in pink and green and blue and orange and white and yellow, and they saw lots of fish, eels, lobsters, clams, sharks, and jellyfish. They even saw an octopus!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: To visit the kingdom of the sea mice. The kingdom of the sea mice is right down at the very bottom, so we have to... and we can take out diving and tell them all about it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah. And that's all the time we have for tonight's Stars and Stories. So maybe next time we'll do Disco and Thisco take their submarine down to the kingdom of the sea mice. And that's the end.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Can I do some shadow puppets please?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: The Moles
characters.description: Weary from a day of retrofitting a discarded plastic bottle into a deep-sea vessel, this clan of master-builder moles retreats into their earthy burrow to huddle for sleep. Their velvet fur is still dusted with the shavings of their craft, a communal exhaustion settling over the family who spent their waking hours welding bottle-cap hatches and securing the scavenged gears of their translucent submarine.

characters.name: Sea Mice
characters.description: Tiny and mysterious, these aquatic denizens inhabit a sovereign kingdom anchored to the crushing depths of the absolute ocean floor.

characters.name: Caribbean Amphibians
characters.description: Creatures that live in a special house within the deep sea.

places.name: The Deep Dark Ocean
places.description: The vast area of water where the explorers begin their journey.

places.name: Kingdom of the Sea Mice
places.description: A mysterious realm and the ultimate destination, hidden within the crushing silence of the absolute ocean floor.

places.name: Caribbean Amphibians' House
places.description: A specific destination mentioned as a possible place to visit.

places.name: Coral Reefs
places.description: A colorful underwater area filled with diverse sea life like octopuses and jellyfish.

places.name: The Trenches
places.description: Deep underwater valleys the submarine must navigate through.

places.name: Deep Sea Bridge
places.description: A large structure the explorers must pass under on their way to the reef.

places.name: Underwater Coffee Shop
places.description: A convenient stopping point for the explorers to get treats during their voyage.
